items.claim: DDP looked fatigued in the third round, worse than expected.
items.quote: DDP looked tired in the third round. Yeah, his cardio held up a lot worse than I expected.

items.claim: Ruffy or Jean Silva possess the stylistic attributes to beat Ilia Topuria if he remains composed.
items.quote: I think if you want someone to like actually beat Ilia when he's being composed, it's probably going to be someone like Ruffy or Jean Silva.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is primarily a grappler with heavy hands who looks for body locks and trips.
items.quote: he's mainly a grappler, but he does actually have very heavy hands. He tries to get to the body lock and then just find trips or throws from there.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein can be countered due to the risks he takes in close range.
items.quote: He definitely can be countered because the risks he takes while in close

items.claim: Cody Gibson is a high-paced wrestler who looks to pressure and secure double leg or body lock takedowns.
items.quote: Gibson's a high paced wrestler when he's at his best. He generally wants to pressure and close the distance quickly and then just work to double leg or body lock
